results.title: Spring-Loaded Latches | McMaster-Carr
results.snippet: Choose from our selection of spring-loaded latches, including slide-bolt locks and latches, push-to-close latches, and more. Same and Next Day Delivery.

results.title: Spring Latches GN 724.1 | Ganter
results.snippet: Spring latches GN 724.1 have a plunger pin with square cross-section, a latching surface on one side and a chamfer on the other. When moving in the direction of the chamfered pin, the plunger pin passes over grooves and edges, as the chamfered pin moves the plunger pin into the guide.

results.title: Spring Loaded Latches - Maxum Hardware
results.snippet: Spring-loaded latches can be used for a variety of applications, including on shipping containers, steel returnable packaging racks, trailers, agricultural equipment, and horse trailers and gates.

results.title: Spring Loaded Latches - Guden - Page 1
results.snippet: The spring latch is made up of several components like clips, a single leaf, pins and springs which are all also available below. Each spring latch has a spring-loaded retactable pin with a bent end to easily open or close a door, lid, cover or gate with ease.

results.title: Spring Hook Latches - Nielsen Hardware
results.snippet: Heavy duty spring hook latches will engage both strikes and integral cover flanges or lips, compensating for gasket "set" over time or varied mating tolerances, providing a consistently tight seal over long term usage.
